name: agentmash
description: A local-first swipe app for turning fast human judgement on AI-generated work into structured feedback packets.

scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build:sim: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:build:device: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:archive:unsigned: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild archive -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath ios/App/build/AgentMash-unsigned.xcarchive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check state.js && node --check intake.js && node --check api-client.js && node --check packet.js && node --check render.js && node --check gestures.js && node --check sw.js && node --check server/agentmash-api.mjs && node --check scripts/build-site.mjs && node --check scripts/refresh-launch-assets.mjs && node --check scripts/launch-check.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-public-url.mjs && node --check scripts/configure-public-launch.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-public-build.mjs && node --check scripts/check-configure-public.mjs && node --check scripts/check-prepare-public-build.mjs && node --check scripts/check-public-url-verifier.mjs && npm run check:launch && npm run check:configure-public && npm run check:prepare-public && npm run check:verify-public && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
scripts.ready:public: npm run check && npm run build
